name: com.surendranb/macos-mcp
description: macOS MCP server with 37 tools for calendar, mail, reminders, notes, music, battery, camera, microphone, and system metrics — designed for agents that need local OS access.

tools.name: capture_camera_snapshot
tools.description: Takes a photo via built-in camera and returns as base64 JPEG

tools.name: get_ambient_noise
tools.description: Records a short audio sample via mic and returns dB levels

tools.name: capture_audio
tools.description: Records audio to WAV file (up to 30s)

tools.name: get_battery_health
tools.description: Detailed battery status: cycle count, max capacity, condition

tools.name: get_system_stats
tools.description: CPU load, memory pressure, battery metrics, thermal level

tools.name: get_storage_scan
tools.description: Deep storage scan: home directory sizes, caches, snapshots

tools.name: run_health_audit
tools.description: Comprehensive health audit: compute, memory, storage, battery

tools.name: run_disk_cleanup
tools.description: Prunes cache folders and empties trash

tools.name: open_url
tools.description: Opens a URL in default browser

tools.name: send_imessage
tools.description: Sends an iMessage/SMS via Messages app

tools.name: get_safari_tabs
tools.description: All open Safari tab URLs and titles

tools.name: get_calendar_events
tools.description: Calendar events for a date range

tools.name: get_music_state
tools.description: Current playback state and track metadata
